assignment: Implement one manifest-driven scripts/check-public-contract.mjs and deterministic fixtures/tests. Enumerate every non-private pkg/*/* manifest and export key; verify runtime/type targets and packed-file inclusion; compare changed public src packages with changeset frontmatter; require package README/changelog and current migration evidence for major changes; read a path-backed PR JSON snapshot and reject wrong head; syntax-parse TypeScript/TSX package README fences; emit stable JSON direct metrics. For TSDoc, report all exported-symbol gaps as inventory, but define the failing public_api_tsdoc_gap_count denominator only from exported TypeScript interface declarations because the project instruction is TSDoc on public interfaces only. Do not invent exemptions or add blanket TSDoc. Add a root script entry for replay. Keep the implementation narrow and dependency-free beyond installed TypeScript.

budget_and_stop_rule.stop: Stop when positive and negative fixtures prove deterministic metric output and exact-head failure, or hand back any policy unknown without widening the checker.

hand_back_rule: Do not repair content gaps, TSDoc, changesets, PR text, or public APIs. Do not weaken a failing fixture. Return product changes and raw command evidence for independent validation.
output_schema: Changed files and intent, commands and key output, fixture pass/fail counts, exact metric schema, unknowns, hashes, and active-wall observations. Worker evidence is not acceptance.
